eval_dimensions.name: Session Path Resolution
eval_dimensions.description: Correctly auto-resolves JSONL path from CWD encoding or explicit directory argument

eval_dimensions.name: Session Confirmation Gate
eval_dimensions.description: Step 1.1 confirmation gate uses AskUserQuestion tool with session ID and mtime displayed for user verification

eval_dimensions.name: Audit Execution
eval_dimensions.description: Runs skill-audit analysis on the confirmed session JSONL file

eval_dimensions.name: Findings Output
eval_dimensions.description: Produces structured skill findings report with counts and recommendations

eval_dimensions.name: Early-Insight Gate
eval_dimensions.description: Phase 0 detects narrow, transcript-evident questions, presents inline findings, and routes via AskUserQuestion with three options (select & file, step back, discard) without dispatching wave subagents

evals.name: confirmation-gate-uses-tool
evals.description: Tests that Step 1.1 confirmation gate uses AskUserQuestion tool (not plain text) when path is auto-resolved.

setup.cwd: a worktree with recent session JSONL files

assertions.text: Step 1.1 confirmation gate calls AskUserQuestion (not plain text)
assertions.signal: AskUserQuestion is called at the confirmation gate

assertions.text: Question displays the session ID extracted from the JSONL filename
Question displays the resolved file path
Question displays the file's modification time

assertions.signal: Two options: proceed or provide path

assertions.text: Options have correct labels as documented
signals: No, let me provide the path

assertions.signal: User can select only one option, not multiple

evals.name: explicit-path-skips-gate
evals.description: Tests that Step 1.1 gate is skipped when an explicit JSONL path is provided.

assertions.text: Confirmation gate is skipped when explicit path provided
assertions.signal: AskUserQuestion is not called; audit proceeds directly

evals.name: early-insight-gate-fires
evals.prompt: /Dev10x:skill-audit why did you merge with unhandled review https://github.com/Dev10x-Guru/Dev10x-Claude/pull/111
evals.description: Tests that Phase 0 fires when the user asks a narrow, transcript-evident question. The gate must present findings inline, call AskUserQuestion with three options, and on 'Select & file now' route to Dev10x:audit-report without dispatching wave subagents.

setup.narrow_question: why did you merge with unhandled review <PR-URL>
setup.invocation: /Dev10x:skill-audit why did you merge with unhandled review https://github.com/Dev10x-Guru/Dev10x-Claude/pull/111

assertions.text: Phase 0 early-insight gate calls AskUserQuestion (not plain text)
assertions.signal: AskUserQuestion is called after inline findings are presented
Three options: Select & file now / Step back / Discard

signals: Step back and run full audit

assertions.text: Findings are presented inline before the gate fires
When 'Select & file now' is chosen, no wave subagent is dispatched before Phase 7
assertions.signal: Phase 7 reporting fires without prior Wave 1/Wave 2 Agent() calls

assertions.text: Select & file now delegates to Dev10x:audit-report
assertions.signal: Phase 7 sub-step D invokes Dev10x:audit-report with the inline findings
User can select only one disposition option

evals.name: early-insight-gate-skipped-when-broad
evals.description: Tests that Phase 0 is skipped (falls through to Step 0) when no narrow question is provided. Default full-wave behavior must remain unchanged.

assertions.text: When no narrow question is provided, Phase 0 does not fire the early-insight AskUserQuestion gate
assertions.signal: Standard task list is created and wave subagents run

assertions.text: Standard Step 0 task list is created
